references.name: HistoryItems_DownloadDirId
references.rationale: History can legitimately outlive a removed download directory.

references.name: HistoryItems_NzbBlobId_Blob
references.rationale: A live history NZB reference requires both bytes and its NzbNames row.

references.name: HistoryItems_NzbBlobId_NzbNames
references.rationale: A live history NZB reference requires its durable display name.

references.name: QueueItems_Id_Blob
references.rationale: Every live queue NZB owns a blob and a matching NzbNames row.

references.name: QueueItems_Id_NzbNames
references.rationale: Every live queue NZB has a durable display-name row.

references.name: DavItems_ParentId
references.rationale: A parent is live or durably queued for asynchronous subtree cleanup; only the canonical root is null.

references.name: DavItems_HistoryItemId
references.rationale: History linkage is live or represented by the durable unlink/delete tombstone.

references.name: DavItems_FileBlobId
references.rationale: A migrated metadata blob is required whenever FileBlobId is set.

references.name: DavItems_NzbBlobId_Blob
references.rationale: A live NZB blob reference requires both bytes and its NzbNames row.

references.name: DavItems_NzbBlobId_NzbNames
references.rationale: A live NZB blob reference requires its durable display name.

references.name: FK_ArrImportCommands_HistoryItems_HistoryItemId
references.rationale: Database-enforced relationship; PRAGMA foreign_key_check must be empty.

references.name: FK_QueueNzbContents_QueueItems_Id
references.rationale: Database-enforced relationship; PRAGMA foreign_key_check must be empty.

references.name: FK_QueuePriorityHints_QueueItems_QueueItemId
references.rationale: Database-enforced relationship; PRAGMA foreign_key_check must be empty.

references.name: FK_RepairEntryHealth_RepairRuns_RepairRunId
references.rationale: Database-enforced relationship; PRAGMA foreign_key_check must be empty.

references.name: RepairEntryHealth_DavItemId
references.rationale: Repair observations retain historical deleted-item identities.

references.name: FK_RepairBrokenFiles_RepairRuns_RepairRunId
references.rationale: Database-enforced relationship; PRAGMA foreign_key_check must be empty.

references.name: RepairBrokenFiles_DavItemId
references.rationale: Repair findings retain historical deleted-item identities.

references.name: FK_DavNzbFiles_DavItems_Id
references.rationale: Database-enforced relationship; PRAGMA foreign_key_check must be empty.

references.name: FK_DavRarFiles_DavItems_Id
references.rationale: Database-enforced relationship; PRAGMA foreign_key_check must be empty.

references.name: FK_DavMultipartFiles_DavItems_Id
references.rationale: Database-enforced relationship; PRAGMA foreign_key_check must be empty.

references.name: HealthCheckResults_DavItemId
references.rationale: Health history can outlive a deleted DAV item.

references.name: ArrDownloadCorrelations_QueueItemId
references.rationale: Correlation rows span queue-to-history transitions.

references.name: ArrDownloadCorrelations_HistoryItemId
references.rationale: Correlation rows retain lifecycle history.

references.name: ArrDownloadLifecycleEvents_QueueItemId
references.rationale: Lifecycle events are historical across queue deletion.

references.name: ArrDownloadLifecycleEvents_HistoryItemId
references.rationale: Lifecycle events are historical across history cleanup.

references.name: ImportReceipts_DavItemId
references.rationale: Receipt states intentionally survive health deletion and removal.

references.name: ImportReceipts_HistoryItemId
references.rationale: Receipt states intentionally survive history cleanup.

references.name: WorkerJobs_TargetId
references.rationale: Target meaning depends on job kind and terminal missing-target completion is supported.

references.name: BlobCleanupItems_Id
references.rationale: Blob cleanup is idempotent, so bytes may already be absent.

references.name: HistoryCleanupItems_Id
references.rationale: History cleanup tombstones may refer to live or already removed history rows.

references.name: DavCleanupItems_Id
references.rationale: DAV cleanup tombstones may refer to live or already removed subtrees.

references.name: NzbNames_Id_Blob
references.rationale: A name may lack bytes only when no live reference exists and cleanup retry is durable.

references.name: NzbBlobCleanupItems_Id
references.rationale: NZB blob cleanup is idempotent, so bytes may already be absent.
